figures.caption: Figure 1. Memory-as-a-Layer branch architecture. Audio embeddings are projected down to the memory dimension d, passed through a Titans NeuralMemory module (depth-2 MLP), projected back to D, and added to the original embeddings through a zeroinitialised residual gate h̃ = h+ tanh(α) · δ.
Table 1. Model Performance Results Across Benchmarks. Bold = best and underline = second-best within each fully evaluated backbone– dataset block.
